title: Set of 2 Ventilated Microwave Food Plate Dish Cover Kitchen Cooking, Pack of 2
features: This pack of 2 clear microwave food covers is a practical kitchen accessory designed to cover and protect your food while microwaving. The covers are designed with side air vents, allowing steam to escape during the microwaving process. This feature helps prevent pressure build-up and ensures even cooking.

The food covers are made of clear, transparent plastic. This material is microwave-safe and allows you to see the contents of your food without removing the cover. Each cover is equipped with two indented finger holes, making it easy to lift and place the cover on containers. The handles remain cool to the touch, providing a convenient way to handle hot dishes.

Each food cover has dimensions of 26cm x 6cm suitable for covering a variety of dishes, bowls, and plates while reheating in the microwave. They help prevent splatters and keep your microwave clean. Dishwasher safe too, making cleanup quick and convenient. After use, you can simply place them in the dishwasher along with your other kitchenware for easy maintenance.
